tourniquet.applyWithin: As soon as life-threatening external hemorrhage on a limb is identified
tourniquet.timeBeforeConversionConsider: 2 hours of total tourniquet time before conversion is considered
tourniquet.leaveInPlaceIf: Patient in shock, transport time short, or amputation distal to TQ

woundPacking.notFor: Junctional or torso non-junctional bleeding only (not chest, abdomen)
woundPacking.material: Combat gauze (hemostatic) or plain gauze if hemostatic unavailable
